name: ClipShot Helper
description: Optional compositor-level screenshot helper for the ClipShot app. Exposes the Shell's internal screenshot API over D-Bus (uk.florinlab.ClipShot) so ClipShot can capture the full screen, the active window (with geometry), and an area at full fidelity — preserving open menus that portal screenshots would dismiss. ClipShot works without this extension; it only improves capture quality.
